title: selaginella rupestris var. brasiliensis
intro: Selaginella rupestris var. brasiliensis, also known as Brazilian rock spike moss, is a type of carnivorous plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. It is often used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant effects. Selaginella rupestris var. brasiliensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are believed to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic uses.
